title: SQL: INSERT...SELECT on column subset
poc: create table test2 (x integer, y varchar(255));
insert into test2 (y) select name from tables;
key_bug_features: INSERT...SELECT on column subset in SQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test2 (x INTEGER, y VARCHAR(255), z BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO test2 (y) SELECT name FROM test1 WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test2 (x, y) SELECT age, name FROM test1 WHERE age < 30;
INSERT INTO test2 (y) SELECT COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') FROM test1;
